user.title: Solkart
user.description: Enter your Solkart API key and location. A free API key is available from the Solkart website.

data_description.api_key: Your Solkart API key (starts with sk_live_).
data_description.latitude: Defaults to your Home Assistant location.
data_description.longitude: Defaults to your Home Assistant location.

array.title: Add a panel array
array.description: Describe a group of panels with the same tilt and orientation. Arrays added so far: {count}. Tick "Add another array" to add east/west splits in one go.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Solkart
reauth_confirm.description: The Solkart API key was rejected. Enter a valid key to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Solkart API.

data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often to poll. Keep this high on the free tier to stay within quota.
data_description.daily: Requires a Basic+ subscription. Ignored on the free tier.
data_description.extended: Requires a Basic+ subscription. Ignored on the free tier.
